results.title: Notion bill processing
results.participants: mrogers@alleatogroup.com, mcalcetero@alleatogroup.com, mgusi@alleatogroup.com, fireflies@alleatogroup.com, mcalcetero@alleatogroup.com, mgusi@alleatogroup.com, fireflies@alleatogroup.com
results.summary:
📄 Invoice Management Process: Streamlined invoicing in Notion with automatic sync to Acumatica, focusing on key statuses only.
🗂️ Tax Document Coordination: Urgent financial documents needed by March 4; call scheduled to ensure collections are ready.
📝 K1 and Tax Filing Clarifications: Confirm K1 preparation with CBIZ; clarify filing strategy with new tax firm for April deadline.
🏦 Trust Account Setup Requirements: Notarization needed for trust documents; bank accounts to be opened separately for each trust.
💰 Cash Flow Strategy Overview: Maintain $300,000 cash reserve; transfer excess into money market for estimated $150,000 annual interest.
🔄 Process Simplification Efforts: Eliminate unnecessary fields in Notion; direct communication for unresolved inquiries to improve workflow.

✅ AR Data Verification Plan: Team to cross-check billing data to ensure accuracy for reliable cash flow and financial reporting.

📋 Payroll Classification Adjustment: Shift executive payroll under overhead with subcategories for better tracking of labor expenses and budgeting.
📅 Meeting for Role Clarity Scheduled: Mandatory meeting planned to finalize task delegation and enhance team autonomy in operations.
🔗 System Integration Changes: Discontinuing Procore-Acumatica link saves $8,000; focus remains on Job Planner a

results.title: Timeco Quick Overview
results.participants: mcalcetero@alleatogroup.com, sam.harris@tcpsoftware.com, jdawson@alleatogroup.com, fireflies@alleatogroup.com, sam.harris@tcpsoftware.com, jdawson@alleatogroup.com, fireflies@alleatogroup.com
results.summary:
✅ System Configuration Finalized: Finalized key system settings for Florida and Indianapolis, ensuring clarity on PTO and bereavement leave types for employees.
🌐 VPN and IP Whitelisting Introduced: Improved remote access by requiring employee-provided IP addresses for smoother login.
⏰ Overtime Calculation Automated: Automated overtime calculations for hourly employees; salaried employees' overtime is not visible to avoid confusion.
📑 Expense Approvals Defined: Expense approvals must occur within the current pay period, ensuring efficient submissions management for managers.
👥 All Employees Needed in TimeCo: All employees, except contractors, must be included in TimeCo for accurate timesheet management.
🧹 Data Cleanup Essential: Data cleanup and role assignments are essential before s

results.title: Uniqlo & GPC Huddle
results.summary: The meeting highlighted steady progress in racking and pipe installations, with a resolution to a crossbar conflict that prevented formal delays. Despite logistics challenges, weekend work is planned for pipe prep and painting. Truck delivery delays are impacting branch line work, but preparatory tasks continue while awaiting materials. Coordination issues on-site were noted, particularly concerning layout and material handling. Caleb's injury was discussed as a short-term workforce risk, but adjustments will allow him to work during recovery. Gaps in daily reporting and photo documentation were identified, with plans to standardize and catch up to ensure quality assurance and compliance.

### Summary of Teams DM Conversation: 19:c4beb912-

The document is a direct message conversation from Microsoft Teams dated May 10, 2026, primarily serving as an operational brief for the recipient, Brandon. This brief outlines the key agenda items for the upcoming days, focusing on project management and team coordination.

The conversation highlights two main items scheduled over the next three days, specifically related to Project Signals. The first item is a weekly status call for the Exol project located in Morrisville, PA, involving collaboration between Exol and Alleato. The second item pertains to a huddle for Uniqlo and GPC at the Phillipsburg, NJ location. The message encourages Brandon to reach out with any questions or requests for follow-ups regarding these items.

results.title: Man Power review
results.summary: The meeting focused on enhancing the project and manpower tracking system, with Jazmin tasked to reorganize the manpower sheet for better clarity and functionality. Tools like Google Sheets, Asana, and Excel are being explored to improve project tracking, while staffing coordination is critical due to existing shortages. Communication protocols are being centralized to streamline access to meeting records. Additionally, initiatives like distributing backpacks to employees aim to boost morale and brand presence. Emphasis was placed on workload management and personal well-being, recognizing the need for flexibility and support as team members navigate their responsibilities.

results.summary:
📅 Interview Scheduling Gaps: Identified inefficiencies in candidate communication and interview scheduling impacting overall team effectiveness.
📂 Resume Integration in Invites: Including resumes directly in calendar invites improved preparation and reduced search time for candidate info.
💻 Technical Issues: Daylight savings and hardware problems, like camera malfunctions, disrupted meetings and highlighted need for better tech management.

🤝 Real-Time Resource Sharing: Immediate sharing of candidate materials through Teams improved coordination and responsiveness between team members.

results.title: One Drive Review
results.summary: The team convened to tackle synchronization problems within OneDrive that resulted in file duplication and inconsistencies in folder contents, particularly affecting workflows. Andrew Cannon highlighted the issue of duplicated folders and missing files, while Maria Calcetero clarified the confusion stemming from personal vaults versus shared files. With a backlog of 18,000 files still uploading, pausing sync was deemed necessary to prevent further issues. They also discussed the impact of temporary Wi-Fi outages on troubleshooting efforts and emphasized the need for better scheduling in IT infrastructure. The team decided to standardize file access through the Alito shared OneDrive to minimize reliance on personal vaults and agreed on the necessity of user training to close knowledge gaps
